notes:
DCA Admissions Suite v2.7.7 Release Notes,
DCA Admissions Suite v2.7.7 strengthens the admissions workflow by adding payment-gated admission letters and student enrollment control.,
New Features,
Added Acceptance Fee tracking.,
Added Paid workflow status.,
Added Acceptance Fee dashboard count.,
Added Acceptance Fee fields:Paid status,
Paid date,
Amount,
Payment method,
Receipt number,
Received by,

Admission Letters are now blocked until Acceptance Fee is marked as paid.,
Batch Admission Letter sending now separates eligible and blocked applicants.,
Added individual Enroll Student action.,
Added batch Enroll Students action.,
Added automatic creation of a Students sheet through the Apps Script backend.,
Added duplicate enrollment protection using Application Reference and Admission Number.,
Added enrollment fields:Enrolled,
Enrolled date,
Enrolled by
